user.title: Braiins Pool
user.description: Enter a read-only Braiins Pool API token (pool.braiins.com → Account → Access Profiles).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Braiins Pool API.

abort.already_configured: This Braiins Pool account is already configured.

init.title: Braiins Pool options
init.description: How often to poll the Braiins Pool API. Pool stats only move on the order of minutes, so larger values are gentler on the recorder database.
